programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
Westworld
programme.desc: Should auld acquaintance be forgot and days of auld lang syne?

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Hello again. Don't worry about a thing. It's all in your head.

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: I heard a fly buzz when I died.

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: You can never go back again. But if you do, bring a shovel.

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Should auld acquaintance be forgot and days of auld lang syne?

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: To thine own selves be true.

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: To thine own selves be true.

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: You want to have a drink at a time like this?

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: You want to have a drink at a time like this?

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Like what I've done with the place? (I just cranked it to expert level.)

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: An extraordinary tale of a mother's love for her daughter, following the life of Costello Jones who wants more for her precocious young daughter.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: An extraordinary tale of a mother's love for her daughter, following the life of Costello Jones who wants more for her precocious young daughter.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: As Costello works her job at a local peep show, a journalist offers an exciting opportunity. Gloria unexpectedly forms a connection at the funeral home, while Selby meanders back to his old ways.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: As Costello works her job at a local peep show, a journalist offers an exciting opportunity. Gloria unexpectedly forms a connection at the funeral home, while Selby meanders back to his old ways.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: Costello goes on an underwhelming date, while Iris confides in Gloria. After an old acquaintance from prison demands restitution, Selby comes to Costello with a proposition.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: In Bruton, Costello is finally able to hold a part-time job and live her best life. As cracks in their family unit begin to form, their seemingly perfect new life begins to deteriorate, with devastating results.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: In Bruton, Costello is finally able to hold a part-time job and live her best life. As cracks in their family unit begin to form, their seemingly perfect new life begins to deteriorate, with devastating results.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: When a visit with her family drudges up old demons, Costello finds the courage to say goodbye to Selby. Allegra arrives to help Selby clean up his act. Gloria receives surprising news.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: When a visit with her family drudges up old demons, Costello finds the courage to say goodbye to Selby. Allegra arrives to help Selby clean up his act. Gloria receives surprising news.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: Post-visit from Fen, Selby enters a heated conversation with his therapist. After receiving surprising news that may turn around her future, Costello ties up some loose ends before leaving London.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: After receiving a troubling call from Iris, Selby rounds up Gloria and Lenny for a road trip in search of Costello, who is close to her breaking point after receiving upsetting news.

programme.title: Rap Sh!t
programme.desc: While on tour, Shawna and Mia struggle to see eye to see with Reina Reign and each other until an uncomfortable afterpart places them back on the same team.

programme.title: Rap Sh!t
programme.desc: While on tour, Shawna and Mia struggle to see eye to see with Reina Reign and each other until an uncomfortable afterpart places them back on the same team.

programme.title: Rap Sh!t
programme.desc: Increasingly frustrated with Francois and Reina Reign's behaviour, Shawna, Mia, and Chastity start to push back. Later, Shawna bonds with Lord AK in the studio while Mia frets over her mistake with Cash.

programme.title: Rap Sh!t
programme.desc: Increasingly frustrated with Francois and Reina Reign's behaviour, Shawna, Mia, and Chastity start to push back. Later, Shawna bonds with Lord AK in the studio while Mia frets over her mistake with Cash.

programme.title: Rap Sh!t
programme.desc: In LA, Francois entices Shawna and Mia with lucrative deals but only under one condition. At the Billboard party, Mia balances two love interests, Shawna and Lord AK draw closer together.

programme.title: Rap Sh!t
programme.desc: Shaken up after their time in LA, Shawna and Mia finally return home to Miami. While Shawna reconnects with Maurice, Mia struggles to adjust to normal life, and Chastity tries to reintegrate herself back into work.

programme.title: Rap Sh!t
programme.desc: Shaken up after their time in LA, Shawna and Mia finally return home to Miami. While Shawna reconnects with Maurice, Mia struggles to adjust to normal life, and Chastity tries to reintegrate herself back into work.

programme.title: Rap Sh!t
programme.desc: With their tour officially over, Shawna weighs a career changing offer from Francois, while Chastity reaches back out to an A&R rep.

programme.title: Rap Sh!t
programme.desc: When presented with differing opportunities, Shawna and Mia must decide once and for all whether their loyalties lie with Francois or Chastity.

programme.title: Rap Sh!t
programme.desc: When presented with differing opportunities, Shawna and Mia must decide once and for all whether their loyalties lie with Francois or Chastity.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: An extraordinary tale of a mother's love for her daughter, following the life of Costello Jones who wants more for her precocious young daughter.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: As Costello works her job at a local peep show, a journalist offers an exciting opportunity. Gloria unexpectedly forms a connection at the funeral home, while Selby meanders back to his old ways.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: As Costello works her job at a local peep show, a journalist offers an exciting opportunity. Gloria unexpectedly forms a connection at the funeral home, while Selby meanders back to his old ways.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: Costello goes on an underwhelming date, while Iris confides in Gloria. After an old acquaintance from prison demands restitution, Selby comes to Costello with a proposition.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: Costello goes on an underwhelming date, while Iris confides in Gloria. After an old acquaintance from prison demands restitution, Selby comes to Costello with a proposition.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: When a visit with her family drudges up old demons, Costello finds the courage to say goodbye to Selby. Allegra arrives to help Selby clean up his act. Gloria receives surprising news.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: When a visit with her family drudges up old demons, Costello finds the courage to say goodbye to Selby. Allegra arrives to help Selby clean up his act. Gloria receives surprising news.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: As he pines for a phone call from Costello, Selby acclimates to his new reality. Costello has found a safe space to land, but must continue to hustle to make a living.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: Post-visit from Fen, Selby enters a heated conversation with his therapist. After receiving surprising news that may turn around her future, Costello ties up some loose ends before leaving London.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: Post-visit from Fen, Selby enters a heated conversation with his therapist. After receiving surprising news that may turn around her future, Costello ties up some loose ends before leaving London.

programme.title: Rain Dogs
programme.desc: After receiving a troubling call from Iris, Selby rounds up Gloria and Lenny for a road trip in search of Costello, who is close to her breaking point after receiving upsetting news.

programme.title: AFLW: EF: Carlton v West Coast
programme.desc: It's do-or-die for Carlton and West Coast in its maiden AFLW finals appearance when they clash in an Elimination Final at Ikon Park.

programme.title: AFLW: QF Melbourne v Brisbane
programme.desc: A long-standing AFLW rivalry writes a new chapter on Sunday with Melbourne and Brisbane fighting for a home Preliminary Final.

programme.title: AFLW: EF: Adelaide v St Kilda
AFL: Port Adelaide v North Melbourne
programme.desc: North Melbourne are in a deep hole with only one win in 2025. Next up, a trip to Adelaide Oval to meet the in-form Power.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics: 1965 GF ESS v STK
AFL Thrillers: GF 2012 Sydney v Hawthorn
programme.desc: In 2012, the Hawks and the Swans faced off for footy's ultimate prize. In a see-sawing affair neither side could break the shackles of their opposition, producing a final term that is a must-see for any football fan.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Denis Banks
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1994 R7 SYD v STK
Best Games Ever: 1999 PF CAR v ESS
programme.desc: The 90s the decade that delivered. There would be three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take premiership honours and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2000 R21 WC v FRE
programme.desc: The 2000s - a decade where Brisbane and Geelong ruled the roost and an era of Brown, Judd and Ablett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2015 R16 ADE v PA
programme.desc: The 2010s - With two new teams, a drawn grand final and plenty of new talent, it was certainly a decade of spellbinding AFL football.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics: 2004 GF PA v BRI
programme.desc: On Fox Footy we take a look back at the VFL/AFL Grand Finals over the last 50 years.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Nathan Brown
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: R3 2004 ESS v WC
AFL Thrillers: R11 2002 GEE v CAR
programme.desc: When the Blues and Cats locked horns in 2002, the Cats looked to have the cream, with a six goal lead at the final change. But the last quarter sees Carlton come within a whisker of a win in a 30 Minute Thriller.

programme.title: Game of the Year: 2003 Round 11 NM v RIC
Incredible Comebacks: 1999 R12 HAW v STK
programme.desc: Is there anything better than when a team looks down and out but then suddenly they flip the script and stage an incredible comeback, here are some of the best.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics: 1967 GF RIC v GEE
programme.desc: On Fox Footy we take a look back at the VFL/AFL Grand Finals over the last 50 years.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Preliminary Final NMT v MEL
programme.desc: Defending AFLW premier North Melbourne hosts rivals Melbourne at Ikon Park for a place in the 2025 Grand Final.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Goat Tell it on the Mountain

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Goat Tell it on the Mountain

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four smiths are tasked with forging signature blades from either a large suspension cable or thin piano wire.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four smiths are tasked with forging signature blades from either a large suspension cable or thin piano wire.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies passes judgement as Julian Clary smashes a table, Lucy Beaumont chews on a tree, and Sam Campbell gets under some lint.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies passes judgement as Julian Clary smashes a table, Lucy Beaumont chews on a tree, and Sam Campbell gets under some lint.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: It's pedal to the metal to kick things off in Speed If You Wanna Go Faster, before we lock up another bunch of drivers behaving badly, firmly Behind Bars.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: It's pedal to the metal to kick things off in Speed If You Wanna Go Faster, before we lock up another bunch of drivers behaving badly, firmly Behind Bars.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: The team think a 300-foot wreck, off the tip of Florida, just might be the Sudoffco: a steel freighter lost in 1926 with 29 men while travelling through the Triangle from New Jersey to the Panama Canal.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: The team think a 300-foot wreck, off the tip of Florida, just might be the Sudoffco: a steel freighter lost in 1926 with 29 men while travelling through the Triangle from New Jersey to the Panama Canal.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: To kick things off, we'll be heading onto the battlefield for Word War Lada, before heading to court to see if we can lock up a few more despicable drivers Behind Bars.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: To kick things off, we'll be heading onto the battlefield for Word War Lada, before heading to court to see if we can lock up a few more despicable drivers Behind Bars.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: Lost in a snowy storm in I Have Snow Idea Where We Are Going, then back on track to play a game we like to call Hit Or Miss.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: Lost in a snowy storm in I Have Snow Idea Where We Are Going, then back on track to play a game we like to call Hit Or Miss.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex chokes down questionable cylindrical meals, while Greg watches Lucy Beaumont mix up flowers with awe, delight and occasional disgust.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: The bike cops assist the local police with the apprehension of three suspect home invaders. An old-timer is pulled over for speeding in a school zone, and the drivers in the construction zone just don't get the message.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: The bike cops assist the local police with the apprehension of three suspect home invaders. An old-timer is pulled over for speeding in a school zone, and the drivers in the construction zone just don't get the message.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A seat belt stop turns into a drug stop, and the three suspects seem to have trouble following the simplest requests from the police.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A seat belt stop turns into a drug stop, and the three suspects seem to have trouble following the simplest requests from the police.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Trainee trucker Danyelle Haigh gets a brutal driving lesson as her family's water drilling rig heads for cattle country.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Trainee trucker Danyelle Haigh gets a brutal driving lesson as her family's water drilling rig heads for cattle country.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: At Polar, Art Burke fights to get back on the road after his truck crashes into a snowbank. Ice roads legend Alex Debogorski makes his triumphant return, facing off with an untested crossing.

programme.title: Swamp Mysteries With Troy Landry
programme.desc: Troy Landry chases a legendary treasure hidden deep in the bayou, helped by his right-hand man Pickle Wheat and veteran hunter Don Brewer; using just a map and an old man's tale.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's nine stories of treasures in Koreatown, and the Vegas ladies discover that one of them has Texas flair. Kenny lucks out looking for lady stuff. Mary gets the spring back in her step.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene brings Gunther along to West Covina for moral support, but gets annoyed when the older German will not take sides; Darrell stumbles over a potential diamond in the rough.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Trainee trucker Danyelle Haigh gets a brutal driving lesson as her family's water drilling rig heads for cattle country.

programme.title: Outback Truckers

programme.desc: The bike cops assist the local police with the apprehension of three suspect home invaders. An old-timer is pulled over for speeding in a school zone, and the drivers in the construction zone just don't get the message.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A seat belt stop turns into a drug stop, and the three suspects seem to have trouble following the simplest requests from the police.

programme.title: DMV
programme.sub-title: There Is No I In DMV
programme.desc: Barb takes the team to North Hollywood to learn from their success, but meeting manager Beau shakes her confidence. Gregg and Vic urge Colette to take a bold risk with Noa.

programme.title: DMV
programme.sub-title: There Is No I In DMV

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Set in the dreaded DMV office, following quirky minimum-wage employees who make the best of dealing with annoyed customers, finding solace in each other's company.

programme.desc: At Polar, Art Burke fights to get back on the road after his truck crashes into a snowbank. Ice roads legend Alex Debogorski makes his triumphant return, facing off with an untested crossing.

programme.title: Ashes: 2021/22 1st Test
programme.desc: The 2021/22 Ashes witnessed the new Test captain, Pat Cummins, silencing critics against a misfiring Joe Root-led England. Head, Labuschagne, and Khawaja put on a batting clinic, while debutant Scotty Boland got '6 at the G'.

programme.title: Ashes: 2021/22 3rd Test
programme.desc: The 2021/22 Ashes witnessed the new Test captain, Pat Cummins, silencing critics against a misfiring Joe Root-led England. Head, Labuschagne, and Khawaja put on a batting clinic, while debutant Scotty Boland got '6 at the G'.

programme.title: Ashes: 2021/22 4th Test
programme.desc: The 2021/22 Ashes witnessed the new Test captain, Pat Cummins, silencing critics against a misfiring Joe Root-led England. Head, Labuschagne, and Khawaja put on a batting clinic, while debutant Scotty Boland got '6 at the G'.

programme.title: The Ashes First Test
programme.desc: The greatest rivalry in cricket gets underway as Australian Captain Steve Smith takes on England's Ben Stokes in Perth.

programme.desc: New Zealand international Sophie Devine leads the Scorchers at home against the Renegades.

programme.desc: The Hurricanes host the Stars in Tasmania for what could be a finals preview.

programme.desc: New Zealand international Sophie Devine leads the Scorchers at home against the Renegades.

programme.desc: The Sydney Smash is here as the Sixers host the Thunder with both seasons on the line.

programme.desc: The Hurricanes host the Stars in Tasmania for what could be a finals preview.

programme.desc: New Zealand international Sophie Devine leads the Scorchers at home against the Renegades.

programme.desc: Ellyse Perry and Meg Lanning headline a East Coast clash as the final week of WBBL action continues.

programme.desc: The Sydney Smash is here as the Sixers host the Thunder with both seasons on the line.

programme.title: Live: WBBL: Thunder v Heat IN1
programme.desc: Phoebe Litchfield's Thunder lineup battles the formidable Heat.

programme.title: Live: WBBL: Thunder v Heat IN2
Live: WBBL Post Game
programme.desc: Join us for all the interviews and celebrations from today's Women's Big Bash cricket.

programme.title: Test Mini NZL v WI
programme.desc: New Zealand defends its home record against a West Indies team desperate to prove itself.

programme.title: WBBL Mini: SCO v REN
programme.desc: New Zealand international Sophie Devine leads the Scorchers at home against the Renegades.

programme.title: 2015: Matt Jones Soars in Aus Open Win
programme.sub-title: 2015: Matt Jones Soars in Aus Open Win
programme.desc: Australian Golf Club, Sydney: Matt Jones survived a nerve-jangling final round to outlast world No.1 Jordan Spieth and a bolting Adam Scott to win the Australian Open.

programme.title: Australian Open Championship 22' FR
programme.desc: The final round of the Australian Open gets underway from Victoria Golf Course. Adrian Meronk finished Round 3 14-under par to Adam Scott's 9-under, and Min Woo Lee's 8-under, so who will take out the title?

programme.title: 2023: Joaquin Niemann Stuns at Aus Open
programme.sub-title: 2023: Joaquin Niemann Stuns at Aus Open

programme.title: Golf: Australian Open Championship FR
programme.desc: The 2024 Australian Open concludes from Kingston Heath Golf Club & The Victoria Golf Club.

programme.title: 1980: Greg Norman's First Aus Open Win
programme.sub-title: 1980: Greg Norman's First Aus Open Win
programme.desc: The Lakes Golf Club: Greg Norman, a young Queenslander with the world at his feet, took another step along the road to golfing greatness by winning his first Australian Open in 1980. He would later go on to win five at this event.

programme.title: 1984: Tom Watson Australian Open Triumph
programme.desc: Royal Melbourne: Tom Watson triumphs in the playoff to become the fifth American to win this Tournament.

programme.title: 1985: Greg Norman Wins Historic Aus Open
programme.sub-title: 1985: Greg Norman Wins Historic Aus Open

programme.title: 1987: Greg Norman Makes Aus Open History
programme.sub-title: 1987: Greg Norman Makes Aus Open History

programme.title: 1995: Greg Norman Wins Fourth Aus Open
programme.sub-title: 1995: Greg Norman Wins Fourth Aus Open
programme.desc: Kingston Heath, Melbourne: In tricky wind conditions, the World No. 1 Greg Norman holed a 40-foot birdie putt off the 17th green to set up a two-shot victory to win his fourth title in this tournament.

programme.title: 1999: Aaron Baddeley's Aus Open Ascent
programme.desc: Royal Syndey: Three weeks after he completed his year 12 exams, Aaron Baddeley went and won an Australian Open at 18 years of age. He became the first amateur since Bruce Devlin in 1960 to win the national Open.

programme.title: 2011: Greg Chalmers Wins Second Aus Open
programme.sub-title: 2011: Greg Chalmers Wins Second Aus Open
programme.desc: The Lakes, Sydney: Australian left-hander Greg Chalmers held his nerve to win the Australian Open for the second time in his career, 13 years after his first win. He held off a late charge by John Senden and Tiger Woods to claim victory.

programme.title: 2013: Rory McIlroy Aus Open Knockout Win
programme.sub-title: 2013: Rory McIlroy Aus Open Knockout Win

programme.title: 1984: Tom Watson Australian Open Triumph
programme.desc: Royal Melbourne: Tom Watson triumphs in the playoff to become the fifth American to win this Tournament.

programme.title: The Meaning of Life
programme.desc: The Monty Python team tackle this weighty subject in a series of sketches involving body parts, religion, the wonders of war, the miracle of birth, and a preview of what awaits in heaven.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: America's grooviest family are back in this big-screen adaptation of the long-running television series. The Bradys must save their home from foreclosure after a tax delinquency notice.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests John Rambo, he must make a daring escape and prepare himself for a one man war.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: A year after his friend's death, Gabe must return to the dreaded mountain peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against criminals, nature and himself.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is back and now he's one of the good guys, assigned to protect freedom fighter John Connor from a cyborg sent by the leader of the human resistance in the future.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Earth is covered with water and the human race struggles to survive on dilapidated boats and makeshift floating cities.

programme.title: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: An orphaned autistic savant who deciphers a government code in a magazine triggers a national security alarm that makes him an assassin's target.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul are desperate to complete the first room in their run-down watermill; brothers Will and Rich must decide which chateau will be their dream home.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul are desperate to complete the first room in their run-down watermill; brothers Will and Rich must decide which chateau will be their dream home.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: While blowing their money on a myriad of antiques in Suffolk, experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott delve into some interesting chapters of the local history.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: While blowing their money on a myriad of antiques in Suffolk, experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott delve into some interesting chapters of the local history.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Will Farmer admires glitzy pieces by Italian designer Piero Fornasetti; John Sandon explores a distinctive collection of ancient Peruvian pottery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Will Farmer admires glitzy pieces by Italian designer Piero Fornasetti; John Sandon explores a distinctive collection of ancient Peruvian pottery.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross presents from the Wetherby Racecourse in Yorkshire. He is joined by experts Richard Madley and Jonathan Pratt who help the teams track down the unearthed treasures.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross presents from the Wetherby Racecourse in Yorkshire. He is joined by experts Richard Madley and Jonathan Pratt who help the teams track down the unearthed treasures.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 70-year-old part-time DJ arrives in Emergency after a high-speed bicycle accident. Meanwhile, a 61-year-old has collapsed after suffering a severe ear infection.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 70-year-old part-time DJ arrives in Emergency after a high-speed bicycle accident. Meanwhile, a 61-year-old has collapsed after suffering a severe ear infection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow returns to Kenilworth Castle in the West Midlands, where new finds include some early Meccano toys, a Special Ops radio set used behind the lines in WWII, and a set of nursing medals.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow returns to Kenilworth Castle in the West Midlands, where new finds include some early Meccano toys, a Special Ops radio set used behind the lines in WWII, and a set of nursing medals.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross presents from the Wetherby Racecourse in Yorkshire. He is joined by experts Richard Madley and Jonathan Pratt who help the teams track down the unearthed treasures.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: While blowing their money on a myriad of antiques in Suffolk, experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott delve into some interesting chapters of the local history.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In addition to the historical tourist attractions, Northamptonshire offers Raj and Irita a plethora of antiques that can fetch them a decent auction value.

programme.title: Inside The Four Seasons
programme.sub-title: Christmas At The Four Seasons: Park Lane
programme.desc: The hotel sparkles for Christmas with festive teas, glittering trees and a giant snowman as staff create a five-star winter wonderland on Park Lane.

programme.title: Inside The Four Seasons
programme.sub-title: Christmas At The Four Seasons: Park Lane
programme.desc: The hotel sparkles for Christmas with festive teas, glittering trees and a giant snowman as staff create a five-star winter wonderland on Park Lane.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a couple swap London for the Chiltern Hills and meets an artist balancing creativity with family life.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a couple swap London for the Chiltern Hills and meets an artist balancing creativity with family life.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: In the grand finale, the three finalists face their ultimate challenges: making delicate opera gloves, transforming party items into outfits, and draping a full outfit on a model.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: In the grand finale, the three finalists face their ultimate challenges: making delicate opera gloves, transforming party items into outfits, and draping a full outfit on a model.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Bree and Caleb fell in love with the treetop feel of their house, however when baby Arlo came along the house no longer suited their needs. Can the floor plan be tweaked to make it more appealing?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Bree and Caleb fell in love with the treetop feel of their house, however when baby Arlo came along the house no longer suited their needs. Can the floor plan be tweaked to make it more appealing?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a couple swap London for the Chiltern Hills and meets an artist balancing creativity with family life.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a Londoner of fifty years start fresh in Wiltshire and meets locals making juice from fruit grown in their garden.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team are in Liverpool where treasures include a medal given to one of the first men to land on D-Day, a dress by Ossie Clark and spoons used by Captain Cook.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team are in Liverpool where treasures include a medal given to one of the first men to land on D-Day, a dress by Ossie Clark and spoons used by Captain Cook.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross presents from the Wetherby Racecourse in Yorkshire. He is joined by experts Richard Madley and Jonathan Pratt who help the teams track down the unearthed treasures.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross hosts this edition from Nottingham Racecourse. Experts Thomas Plant and Nick Hall are on hand as antiques advisors. An exhilarating auction sees the two teams make profits galore.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets the founder of Crop Swap Australia, a food sharing community. Ed makes caramelised rosemary and cardamom custard. Julie gives flatpack furniture a makeover.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Pete check out a company who project your floor plans and elevations onto the floor of an enormous warehouse at 1:1 scale; Adam shows how to repair leaky pipes and gutter guards.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Jon and Carmen convert a smoke-damaged room into a guest bedroom by the Lot River; Stephanie and Philip prepare for their engagement party.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul are desperate to complete the first room in their run-down watermill; brothers Will and Rich must decide which chateau will be their dream home.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil is with Kinga and Dave, who are moving with their toddler, Lily, in the hope of finding a house in the more affordable Leeds. Kirstie is with Max, who is moving from Birmingham to be close to new partner, Dan.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Bree and Caleb fell in love with the treetop feel of their house, however when baby Arlo came along the house no longer suited their needs. Can the floor plan be tweaked to make it more appealing?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Bree and Caleb fell in love with the treetop feel of their house, however when baby Arlo came along the house no longer suited their needs. Can the floor plan be tweaked to make it more appealing?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Soon to be empty nesters Michelle and Adrian are at a crossroads. Michelle is emotionally tied to their ageing seven-bedroom family home while Adrian's ready to embrace a new chapter. Can Neale breathe new life into a house bursting with memories, or will Andrew convince that happiness might just be waiting in a brand new home?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Soon to be empty nesters Michelle and Adrian are at a crossroads. Michelle is emotionally tied to their ageing seven-bedroom family home while Adrian's ready to embrace a new chapter. Can Neale breathe new life into a house bursting with memories, or will Andrew convince that happiness might just be waiting in a brand new home?

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a Londoner of fifty years start fresh in Wiltshire and meets locals making juice from fruit grown in their garden.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a couple swap London for the Chiltern Hills and meets an artist balancing creativity with family life.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Michelle & Adrian face an empty nest. She is attached to their ageing seven bedroom home, he wants a fresh start. Neale tries to revive it while Andrew searches for a new place.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Michelle & Adrian face an empty nest. She is attached to their ageing seven bedroom home, he wants a fresh start. Neale tries to revive it while Andrew searches for a new place.

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs; even the agents involved.

programme.title: The Frozen Ground
programme.desc: The incredible true story that follows an Alaskan State Trooper as he sets out to end the murderous rampage of a serial killer who has gone unnoticed for 13 years.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: The true story of Captain Richard Phillips and the 2009 hijacking by Somali pirates of the US-flagged MV Maersk Alabama, the first American cargo ship to be hijacked in two hundred years.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Marriage Made for Murder
Non-Stop
programme.desc: Air Marshal Bill Marks receives cryptic text messages during a flight demanding the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account - or a passenger will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: Far from Heaven
programme.desc: Suburban America in the 1950s: a place where autumn leaves fall on cue, until scandal comes calling for a perfect wife.

programme.title: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When a food stylist finds out the owner of her favorite bakery is retiring and sponsoring a baking contest to see who will be her successor, she enters but then is forced to join forces with a rival chef.

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
Christmas Lost and Found
programme.desc: After years of missing family gatherings, event planner Whitney is off to spend Christmas with Grandma Frances. But in an unfortunate turn of events, Whitney throws out a box of precious family ornaments.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Don't Breathe
programme.desc: A group of teens break into a blind man's home, thinking they'll get away with the perfect crime.

programme.title: Don't Breathe
programme.desc: A group of teens break into a blind man's home, thinking they'll get away with the perfect crime.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: Long before the evil Queen Ravenna was vanquished by Snow White's blade, she watched silently as her sister, Freya, suffered a heartbreaking betrayal and fled their kingdom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment, Ethan chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the wrong hands. The IMF team must stop the fallout.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment, Ethan chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the wrong hands. The IMF team must stop the fallout.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they're trapped on a raft, 160km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they're trapped on a raft, 160km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: With his and Clare's wedding day fast approaching, a high-stress Henry suddenly begins to travel more than ever and grows increasingly desperate to find a solution.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alicia takes refuge in the home of a mysterious stranger. With her fevers growing worse and Arnold pursuing her at every turn, Alicia is forced to confront the failings of her past.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Family vlogging is examined through YouTube's algorithm. As adoption day nears the Stauffers post countdowns, but two years later Huxley vanishes from their vlogs.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Family vlogging is examined through YouTube's algorithm. As adoption day nears the Stauffers post countdowns, but two years later Huxley vanishes from their vlogs.

programme.title: El Accidente
programme.desc: Juan and Maria go after the lorry when they find out it's being tracked.

programme.title: El Accidente
programme.desc: The police ask Lucia to infiltrate Joao's estate and plant bugs so that they can monitor his activity.

programme.title: El Accidente
programme.desc: The police ask Lucia to infiltrate Joao's estate and plant bugs so that they can monitor his activity.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The origin of heavy metal's devil horns, the enduring myths behind Tupac Shakur and we investigate Pattie Boyd, the woman who came in between two rock icons.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The unexplained disappearance and death of Philip Taylor Kramer, the violent party that made the Allman Brothers Band possible and the secret behind Becky With The Good Hair.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The unexplained disappearance and death of Philip Taylor Kramer, the violent party that made the Allman Brothers Band possible and the secret behind Becky With The Good Hair.

programme.title: Secrets of the Hells Angels
programme.desc: Charles 'Peewee' Goldsmith survives biker wars to become a Hells Angels President, but the club later turns on him and his family.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and Kristin are called to investigate what appears to be homicide by poisoning, after golf club owner Adele Stone falls to her death.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and Kristin are called to investigate what appears to be homicide by poisoning, after golf club owner Adele Stone falls to her death.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires hold a seance to deal with a ghost infestation, which leads to a larger infestation.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.sub-title: You Can't Take It With You: Part One

programme.title: The Big C
programme.sub-title: You Can't Take It With You: Part One

programme.title: The Big C
programme.sub-title: You Can't Take It With You: Part Two
programme.desc: In the wake of discontinuing chemotherapy, Cathy starts planning for her family's future, including helping Paul find a new wife.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.sub-title: You Can't Take It With You: Part Two

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alicia takes refuge in the home of a mysterious stranger. With her fevers growing worse and Arnold pursuing her at every turn, Alicia is forced to confront the failings of her past.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alicia takes refuge in the home of a mysterious stranger. With her fevers growing worse and Arnold pursuing her at every turn, Alicia is forced to confront the failings of her past.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Heart surgeon Charlotte and her husband, consultant anesthetist Jacob are a high-flying married couple. But things soon turn upside down when their mysterious new colleague Mia rents out the house next door.

programme.title: Justified
programme.desc: Enforcing his own brand of justice, US Marshal Raylan, a strong-willed, quiet law-man haunted by his past, returns to his native town to see that justice is served to those in need.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and Kristin are called to investigate what appears to be homicide by poisoning, after golf club owner Adele Stone falls to her death.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries

programme.title: The Big C
programme.sub-title: You Can't Take It With You: Part One
programme.desc: In the wake of discontinuing chemotherapy, Cathy starts planning for her family's future, including helping Paul find a new wife.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Heart surgeon Charlotte and her husband, consultant anesthetist Jacob are a high-flying married couple. But things soon turn upside down when their mysterious new colleague Mia rents out the house next door.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Heart surgeon Charlotte and her husband, consultant anesthetist Jacob are a high-flying married couple. But things soon turn upside down when their mysterious new colleague Mia rents out the house next door.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: While the vampires fear they've been electronically cursed, Guillermo tries to thwart a deadly threat to his masters.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: While the vampires fear they've been electronically cursed, Guillermo tries to thwart a deadly threat to his masters.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and Kristin are called to investigate what appears to be homicide by poisoning, after golf club owner Adele Stone falls to her death.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and Kristin are called to investigate what appears to be homicide by poisoning, after golf club owner Adele Stone falls to her death.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal and Will form a bond as Will undergoes a dark transformation. Meanwhile, Margot grows concerned over her brother's violent nature; and Will agrees to be interviewed for Freddie's book.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal and Will form a bond as Will undergoes a dark transformation. Meanwhile, Margot grows concerned over her brother's violent nature; and Will agrees to be interviewed for Freddie's book.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Carrie's obsession deepens as she executes her plan to abduct Milo, but her scheme unravels in shocking fashion.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Marissa learns the dark truth about Carrie's past and faces an impossible choice to protect her family.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Marissa learns the dark truth about Carrie's past and faces an impossible choice to protect her family.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: A kindhearted man who works to help people find jobs is manipulated into doubling for the President of the United States after he suffers a stroke in the arms of a young woman.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known, and the least successful. Over the years he has tried to conquer Metro City in every imaginable way. Each attempt, a colossal failure thanks to the caped superhero known as Metro Man, until the day Megamind actually defeats him in the throes of one of his botched evil plans. Suddenly, the fate of Metro City is threatened when a new villain arrives and chaos runs rampant, leaving everyone to wonder: can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known, and the least successful. Over the years he has tried to conquer Metro City in every imaginable way. Each attempt, a colossal failure thanks to the caped superhero known as Metro Man, until the day Megamind actually defeats him in the throes of one of his botched evil plans. Suddenly, the fate of Metro City is threatened when a new villain arrives and chaos runs rampant, leaving everyone to wonder: can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the comic misadventures of a young Peruvian bear who travels to the city in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined until he meets the kindly Brown family who read the label around his neck that says "Please look after this bear. Thank you," and offer him a temporary haven. It looks as though his luck has changed until this rarest of bears catches the eye of a museum taxidermist.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the comic misadventures of a young Peruvian bear who travels to the city in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined until he meets the kindly Brown family who read the label around his neck that says "Please look after this bear. Thank you," and offer him a temporary haven. It looks as though his luck has changed until this rarest of bears catches the eye of a museum taxidermist.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building in a modern Chinese city, she and her mischievous friends, Jin and Peng, name him Everest and embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family at the highest point on Earth. But the trio of friends will have to stay one-step ahead of Burnish, a wealthy man intent on capturing a Yeti, and zoologist Dr. Zara to help Everest get home.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building in a modern Chinese city, she and her mischievous friends, Jin and Peng, name him Everest and embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family at the highest point on Earth. But the trio of friends will have to stay one-step ahead of Burnish, a wealthy man intent on capturing a Yeti, and zoologist Dr. Zara to help Everest get home.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee appears at the door of a stressed young mother, who is trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war. But once she's arrived, Nanny McPhee discovers that the children are fighting a war of their own against two spoiled city cousins who have just moved in and refuse to leave.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee appears at the door of a stressed young mother, who is trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war. But once she's arrived, Nanny McPhee discovers that the children are fighting a war of their own against two spoiled city cousins who have just moved in and refuse to leave.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Eccentric scientist John Hammond plans to open a theme park consisting of live dinosaurs, genetically engineered from DNA. Archaeologists Alan Grant and Ellie Sattler are invited to view the park, only to find themselves being hunted when the dinosaurs break free.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is coping with some major life changes. His owner is now married and has a toddler, Liam. Max is so worried about protecting the boy that he develops a nervous tic. On a family trip to a farm, Max and mutt Duke encounter canine-intolerant cows, hostile foxes and a terrifying turkey, all of which only elevates Max's anxiety. Luckily, Max gets some guidance from veteran farm dog Rooster, who pushes Max to ditch his neuroses, find his inner alpha and give Liam a little more freedom.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is coping with some major life changes. His owner is now married and has a toddler, Liam. Max is so worried about protecting the boy that he develops a nervous tic. On a family trip to a farm, Max and mutt Duke encounter canine-intolerant cows, hostile foxes and a terrifying turkey, all of which only elevates Max's anxiety. Luckily, Max gets some guidance from veteran farm dog Rooster, who pushes Max to ditch his neuroses, find his inner alpha and give Liam a little more freedom.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Morty and other zoo animals find a way to escape from Madagascar when the penguins reassemble a wrecked airplane. The precariously repaired craft stays airborne just long enough to make it to the African continent. There the New Yorkers encounter members of their own species for the first time. Africa proves to be a wild place, but Alex and company wonder if it is better than their Central Park home.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A high velocity comedy about an underdog snail who kicks into overdrive when he miraculously attains the power of super-speed. But after making fast friends with a crew of streetwise, tricked-out es-car-goes, Turbo learns that no one succeeds on their own. So he puts his heart and shell on the line to help his pals achieve their dreams, before Turbo-charging his own impossible dream: winning the Indy 500.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A high velocity comedy about an underdog snail who kicks into overdrive when he miraculously attains the power of super-speed. But after making fast friends with a crew of streetwise, tricked-out es-car-goes, Turbo learns that no one succeeds on their own. So he puts his heart and shell on the line to help his pals achieve their dreams, before Turbo-charging his own impossible dream: winning the Indy 500.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: Three older guys get to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams becoming heroes to the bullied, clumsy and athletically-challenged everywhere.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: As a crime wave sweeps the city and the police department suffers a shortage of officers, the mayor decrees that admission to the police academy will be open to any and all applicants.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Stumbling onto what could be one of the biggest crimes in years, can misfit NYPD detectives step up their game to solve the case without killing each other and destroying NYC in the process?

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: With both Internal Affairs and their main suspect on their tails, veteran police detective Joe and his rookie partner KC have to infiltrate the dangerous world of the hip-hop recording industry.

programme.title: A Million Ways to Die in the West
